_comment: SMTP configuration seed — shape mirrors POST /api/smtp-config payload. Fill in real credentials before use.

_providers._comment: Copy the values below into the fields above for your provider

gmail.note: Use an App Password, not your Gmail password. Enable 2FA first.

sendgrid.note: Set password to your SendGrid API key.

postmark.note: Use your Postmark Server API Token as both username and password.

mailgun.note: Username is your Mailgun SMTP login, password is your SMTP password from Mailgun domain settings.

ses.note: Generate SMTP credentials from IAM in the SES Console.
